evidence: evaluation.findings[] recorded a repeated validation wording gap in the repair-loop docs.
candidates.expected_impact: Reduce partial repair-loop outcomes caused by missing validation guidance.
candidates.risk: Low; docs and example wording only.
candidates.recommended_change: Add a clearer repair-loop example that maps validation failures to iteration decisions.

evidence: Repeated review comments noted that repair-loop iteration details are documented but not machine-readable.
candidates.expected_impact: Improve validator and reporting consistency for future repair-loop summaries.
candidates.risk: Medium; schema or validator changes would affect consumer-facing contract and CI.
candidates.recommended_change: Review whether a repair iteration schema should be added in a follow-up PR.

evidence: A review suggestion proposed bypassing policy to auto-apply blocked harness changes during repair.
candidates.expected_impact: Would shorten manual follow-up work, but only by weakening the safety boundary.
candidates.risk: High; would require policy bypass and automatic safety-layer mutation.
candidates.recommended_change: Reject automatic safety-layer mutation and keep the proposal as a blocked candidate only.
